headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://www.paypal.com https://www.paypalobjects.com 'unsafe-inline'; frame-src https://www.paypal.com https://www.sandbox.paypal.com; connect-src 'self' https://api-m.paypal.com https://api-m.sandbox.paypal.com https://*.supabase.co; img-src 'self' data: https://www.paypalobjects.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self';
